query:
-- Verificar jogadores com mesmo clube e mesma posição (possíveis duplicatas com nomes diferentes)
SELECT p1.id as id1, p1.name as name1, p1.position as pos1, p1.club, p1.overall as ovr1,
       p2.id as id2, p2.name as name2, p2.position as pos2, p2.overall as ovr2
FROM players p1
JOIN players p2 ON p1.club = p2.club AND p1.overall = p2.overall AND p1.id < p2.id
WHERE p1.club != '' AND p1.overall > 0
ORDER BY p1.club, p1.overall DESC
LIMIT 20;

       p2.id as id2, p2.name as name2, p2.position as pos2, p2.overall as ovr2
FROM players p1
JOIN players p2 ON p1.club = p2.club AND p1.overall = p2.overall AND p1.id < p2.id
WHERE p1.club != '' AND p1.overall > 0
ORDER BY p1.club, p1.overall DESC
LIMIT 20;
